generated_by: harness drift normalization Wave 2 Agent A2 (PR-1)
description: 5-category taxonomy of harness hooks. Distinguishes between globally-registered hooks (in ~/.claude/settings.json, fire on every session) and project-installed hooks (config-gated, only fire when SDK init has run inside a project). Implements CANONICALS.md D3: subsystem hooks are project-installed-only.

global_live.description: Registered in ~/.claude/settings.json. Fires on every session, no project config required.

hooks.name: detect-bootstrap-needed.js
hooks.purpose: Detect if cwd needs claude-env-bootstrap and inject [BOOTSTRAP_HINT]

hooks.name: gsd-prompt-guard.js
hooks.purpose: Guard GSD prompt patterns

hooks.name: gsd-read-guard.js
hooks.purpose: Guard GSD-protected file reads

hooks.name: gsd-workflow-guard.js
hooks.purpose: Guard GSD workflow boundaries

hooks.name: gsd-validate-commit.sh
hooks.purpose: Validate GSD commit conventions

hooks.name: gsd-context-monitor.js
hooks.purpose: Monitor context window usage

hooks.name: gsd-read-injection-scanner.js
hooks.purpose: Scan Read output for prompt injection

hooks.name: gsd-phase-boundary.sh
hooks.purpose: Enforce GSD phase boundary

hooks.name: gsd-check-update.js
hooks.purpose: Check for GSD updates

hooks.name: gsd-session-state.sh
hooks.purpose: Persist session state

hooks.name: gsd-statusline.js
hooks.purpose: Render GSD statusline

hooks.name: report-gate.js
hooks.purpose: Deterministic completion-report gate (HARD block): after a non-trivial turn (Agent/Task/Workflow used, or >=N file edits) whose closing assistant message has no report >= threshold chars, block the stop so the model must produce the CLAUDE.md §0.5/§0.6/§0.7 report. Enforces report PRESENCE, not quality; format stays prompt-guided. Loop-safe via stop_hook_active; FAILS OPEN (productivity gate, not safety); tunable via CLAUDE_REPORT_GATE_MINCHARS/MINEDITS/OFF

hooks.name: plan-card-reminder.js
hooks.purpose: Deterministic plan-preview-card reminder (SOFT — never blocks): on the >=3rd Agent/Task of a turn or ANY Workflow launch without a §0.6 plan-card rendered this turn, inject an additionalContext reminder (CLAUDE.md §0.6). At most once per turn; suppressed once a card marker appears; FAILS OPEN; tunable via CLAUDE_PLAN_CARD_MINAGENTS/OFF

hooks.name: ledger-reminder.js
hooks.purpose: Deterministic durable-LEDGER reminder (SOFT, one-shot, fail-open): on a fan-out turn (Agent/Task/Workflow) where the whole session never touched a .goals/ or *LEDGER* file, decision:block once with a reminder to record the goal/断点 in <repo>/.goals/LEDGER.md (CLAUDE.md §0.7 layer-2 fixed entry) + a pointing project memory. Loop-safe via stop_hook_active; tunable via CLAUDE_LEDGER_REMINDER_OFF. Wired via wire-manifest batch C; bootstrap step 9 seeds the .goals/LEDGER.md stub.

project_installed.description: Config-gated hooks installed via subsystem SDK init. Each subsystem's hook .js + its _<sub>-common.js are COPIED project-local into <project>/.claude/hooks/, and registered (nested {matcher,hooks:[{type,command}]} form, command=node "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/<name>") into <project>/.claude/settings.json by the SDK init command. Both the copy and the settings merge are performed by the single shared installer orchestrator-runtime/shared/install-subsystem-hooks.js, which reads THIS registry as the source of truth (do not re-implement per SDK). Fresh projects without the corresponding config gate have NO enforcement. Hooks are committed with the repo (self-contained clone-and-run; user lock 2026-05-30).

hooks.name: appsec-active-scan-guard.js
hooks.purpose: Block active security scans without ROE + authorization

hooks.name: appsec-secret-access-guard.js
hooks.purpose: Block raw secret material reads (Read .env/*.pem/*.key) and Bash cat/printenv exfil; require redaction

hooks.name: appsec-finding-schema-prewrite.js
hooks.purpose: Validate finding YAML/JSON against standardized schema before write; block direct Edit/MultiEdit of protected findings/decisions (E7 2026-06-05)

hooks.name: appsec-pentest-authorization.js
hooks.purpose: Hard gate for authorized-pentest-validation Skill/Agent invocation (13-field ROE / 11 user-visible sections + window + sign-off)

hooks.name: appsec-finding-schema-postverify.js
hooks.purpose: Post-write validation of finding artifacts (matcher includes MultiEdit for symmetry with prewrite)

hooks.name: appsec-secret-redaction.js
hooks.purpose: Last-line defense: scan final assistant message/transcript for raw secret patterns; never downgradable to warn-only

hooks.name: appsec-evidence-required.js
hooks.purpose: Block phase completion if .appsec/evidence/<tag>/ is empty

hooks.name: appsec-pentest-recommended.js
hooks.purpose: ADVISORY-ONLY (emitAdvisory + exit 0, never blocks): after a release decision, if pentest_recommendation.recommended==true AND surfaced!=true AND pentest_status in {not_required, skipped_with_reason}, inject the SKILL.md §16.9.5 pentest recommendation card. NEVER invokes/routes-to/pre-stages authorized-pentest-validation (manual gate untouched).

hooks.name: appsec-preview-gate.js
hooks.purpose: workflow-spec launch gate: recompute spec_hash + verify approval sentinel + TTL for deterministic appsec-orchestrator launches

hooks.name: governed-gate-workflow-guard.js
hooks.purpose: Governed Gate Mode (CLAUDE.md §3.7, post-4.8): block inline model-authored Dynamic Workflows / ultracode during an active gate; cross-domain (also installed by qa-sdk init)

hooks.name: qa-block-update-snapshots.js
hooks.purpose: Block visual-regression baseline updates without authorization

hooks.name: qa-quarantine-accountability.js
hooks.purpose: On git commit: require justification/accountability fields when quarantining tests or adding test files

hooks.name: qa-floor-rule-prompt.js
hooks.purpose: After edits to risk-relevant files: inject QA floor-rule advisory (PostToolUse, non-blocking)

hooks.name: qa-detect-internal-mock.js
hooks.purpose: Detect over-mocking of internal modules

hooks.name: qa-evidence-required.js
hooks.purpose: Block phase completion if .qa/evidence/<tag>/ is empty

hooks.name: qa-preview-gate.js
hooks.purpose: workflow-spec launch gate: recompute spec_hash + verify approval sentinel + TTL + commercial-cert budget approval for deterministic qa-orchestrator launches

hooks.name: qa-bundle-write-guard.js
hooks.purpose: Block direct non-SDK writes to .qa/evidence/<tag>/{qa_evidence_bundle,gate-result,release-decision} verdict files (drift guard; D1). Matcher MUST include MultiEdit

hooks.name: qa-main-thread-test-guard.js
hooks.purpose: 承重柱 2 (P1, 2026-06-16): enforce SUBAGENT-ONLY test execution — block test-runner commands (vitest/jest/playwright/k6/pytest/go test/npm test/…) on the MAIN thread (payload has NO agent_id); allow when a subagent runs them (agent_id present, harness-set/unforgeable). strict=block(exit 2), warn=advisory, non-QA=silent. Pairs with default-mode recompute (qa-recompute-gate.js invoked by gate.check).

hooks.name: qa-mark-stale.js
hooks.purpose: Proactively mark .qa/evidence/<tag>/ STALE after a QA-relevant source/config/test edit or deploy command, once a bundle for the active tag exists (D2)

hooks.name: governed-gate-workflow-guard.js
hooks.purpose: Governed Gate Mode (CLAUDE.md §3.7, post-4.8): block inline model-authored Dynamic Workflows / ultracode during an active gate; cross-domain (also installed by appsec-sdk init)

hooks.name: qa-required-layer-gate.js
hooks.purpose: P3 fail-closed (2026-06-16): if Architecture-Intake 00-test-plan.json marks layers required:true, BLOCK session completion when any required layer's expected_artifact is missing/empty/lacks command_evidence. ADDITIVE: no test-plan → NO-OP.

hooks.name: qa-runtime-mismatch-gate.js
hooks.purpose: P3 fail-closed (2026-06-16): BLOCK when a host_capable mobile/API/desktop runtime target (00-runtime.json/00-test-plan.json) is covered only by web Playwright/Cypress E2E (web-only fallback). ADDITIVE: no intake → NO-OP; host_capable:false → NOT_APPLICABLE, never double-block.

hooks.name: qa-no-silent-fallback.js
hooks.purpose: P3 fail-closed (2026-06-16): evidence recording fallback_used:true requires a valid .qa/fallback-approval.json (qa-sdk fallback.approve --human-attested). PreToolUse blocks the write (exit 2); Stop blocks completion. ADDITIVE: no fallback markers → NO-OP.

hooks.name: qa-entry-ask-required.js
hooks.purpose: P4 soft entry gate (2026-06-16): block qa-sdk evidence.run/evidence.append/gate.check until .qa/state/level-selected.json exists (SKILL §6 Step 0 + qa-sdk level.select). NARROW — only those commands; FAIL-OPEN. Honest: platform cannot force ask-first (CLAUDE.md §0.1).

hooks.name: qa-tasklist-required.js
hooks.purpose: P4 soft reminder (2026-06-16): advisory nudge to write .qa/state/tasklist.json (durable to-do surviving /clear) before QA evidence/gate commands. NEVER blocks (fail-open).

hooks.name: uiux-gsd-plan-guard.js
hooks.purpose: Block /gsd-plan-phase Skill on a frontend phase when UI-SPEC.md is missing (strict)

hooks.name: uiux-style-mutex-guard.js
hooks.purpose: On Skill invocation: enforce L3 style mutex (taste/luxury/minimalist/soft mutually exclusive); reject workflow skills as L3

hooks.name: uiux-release-guard.js
hooks.purpose: Dual-mode release gate. PreToolUse(Skill): hard-block /gsd-ship unless .uiux/decisions/<tag>/uiux_release_decision.yaml exists with decision PASS|CONDITIONAL_PASS. Stop: soft nag if assistant claims UI/shipping completion while a decision exists and is not PASS/CONDITIONAL_PASS (reads transcript_path fallback)

hooks.name: disc-session-context.js
hooks.purpose: Inject L12 status into session context if discoverability.config.yaml exists

hooks.name: disc-robots-sitemap-guard.js
hooks.purpose: Guard robots.txt / sitemap / llms.txt edits against AppSec access-control confusion

hooks.name: disc-deploy-gate.js
hooks.purpose: Block deploy commands if L12 gate-result.yaml = FAIL or BLOCKED

hooks.name: disc-mark-stale.js
hooks.purpose: Auto-mark L12 evidence stale after deploy or config change

hooks.name: disc-evidence-required.js
hooks.purpose: Block phase completion if evidence/discoverability/<tag>/ is empty

i2r.config_gate_note: INTENTIONAL I2R VARIANT — I2R has NO config-gate file (no .i2r/config.json). Its hooks fail-open/silent on non-i2r projects by gating on run-folder presence (.i2r/runs/ exists) instead of a config file. This is by design (CONTRACT.md §13): a fresh project without an active I2R run gets ZERO i2r-hook enforcement. Hooks are committed project-local in <project>/.claude/hooks/ and registered into <project>/.claude/settings.json by `i2r.py install` (NOT by `i2r.py init`, which only scaffolds the run folder).

hooks.name: i2r-session-context.js
hooks.purpose: Inject active I2R run + current stage pointer + `status` command into session context

hooks.name: i2r-auto-trigger-boundary.js
hooks.purpose: Requirements-shaped prompt → nudge toward I2R; implementation/code prompt → nudge AWAY (keeps I2R from doing GSD's job)

hooks.name: i2r-write-boundary.js
hooks.purpose: Block writes to implementation dirs (src/ app/ lib/ packages/ tests/ database/ migrations/ api/ routes/ components/ ui/) while I2R is active (CONTRACT.md §14)

hooks.name: i2r-mode-gate.js
hooks.purpose: Block downstream when routing-required search/discussion/debate stages are not done

hooks.name: i2r-mark-stale.js
hooks.purpose: Upstream artifact changed → mark downstream stages STALE

hooks.name: i2r-subagent-output-gate.js
hooks.purpose: Verify owned artifact exists + schema-valid + generated_by_agent == expected owner + _meta complete before subagent work is accepted (CONTRACT.md §4)

hooks.name: i2r-citation-gate.js
hooks.purpose: Ensure evidence CARDS in 02b-evidence.json carry a source_ref (reuses `i2r.py evidence.validate`)

hooks.name: i2r-readiness-gate.js
hooks.purpose: Block 'requirements done / ready for GSD' unless both reviews PASS + gate ∈ {READY, NEEDS_REVIEW} + no open BLOCKER

library_modules.description: Shared helper modules used by the project-installed hooks. Not hooks themselves; not registered in settings.json. Imported by hook scripts at runtime.

modules.name: _i2r-common.js
modules.note: Shared lib for i2r-*.js hooks: run-folder discovery, state read, redaction helpers. Copied project-local with the i2r hooks.

modules.name: git-cmd.js
modules.note: Conventional Commits gate token-walk classifier (isGitSubcommand); lives in hooks/lib/, NOT copied project-local (gsd hook is global)

dormant_opt_in.description: Hooks present on disk but intentionally not registered in settings.json. Available for opt-in but suppressed by default.

entries.name: gsd-update-banner.js
entries.reason: GSD statusline already registered; banner would duplicate notification. Available for users who prefer banner over statusline.

deprecated.description: Hooks removed or renamed. Listed here so audit tools can flag legacy references.

enforcement_gaps_callout.description: Subsystems whose docs may have implied global enforcement but whose hooks are project-installed only. Fresh projects without the corresponding config gate have ZERO subsystem-hook enforcement; only GSD hooks fire globally. NOTE: i2r is the one variant that gates on run-folder presence (.i2r/runs/) rather than a required config file (config is optional) — see config_gates.i2r.

config_gates.i2r: <project>/.i2r/runs/ (.i2r/ workspace presence; config OPTIONAL — intentional I2R variant)

enforcement_gaps_callout.remediation: claude-env-bootstrap EXECUTE §7.1a now auto-runs the right init for each selected subsystem (2026-05-30), and each SDK init is an idempotent hook-installer (creates <sub> config if missing + copies project-local hooks + merges settings.json via install-subsystem-hooks.js). Users invoking a subsystem in a project NOT created by bootstrap can run the install_command above once (bare init, no release tag needed).
